query: UPDATE clients SET deletedAt = NULL WHERE deletedAt IS NOT NULL AND deletedAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute UPDATE clients SET deletedAt = NULL WHERE deletedAt IS NOT NULL AND deletedAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR);
